prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Atorvastatin (20 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 52.2 kg; Height 165.7 cm; BMI 19.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 145/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 8.3%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 215mg/dL; 9 months ago 239mg/dL; 6 months ago 228mg/dL; 3 months ago 198mg/dL; current 124mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.2kg; 9 months ago 51.8kg; 6 months ago 53.2kg; 3 months ago 49.8kg; current 52.2kg), Height (12 months ago 165.7cm; 9 months ago 165.7cm; 6 months ago 165.7cm; 3 months ago 165.7cm; current 165.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 145mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 145mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 145mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 114U/L; 9 months ago 107U/L; 6 months ago 98U/L; 3 months ago 85U/L; current 107U/L), AST (12 months ago 97U/L; 9 months ago 82U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 77U/L; current 89U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; current 99mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 20mg/g; 9 months ago 16mg/g; 6 months ago 19mg/g; 3 months ago 20mg/g; current 17mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 147mg/dL; 6 months ago 142mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 154mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.4g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.6g/dL; 3 months ago 12.7g/dL; current 13.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.90 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
